title: aster calendulaceus
intro: Aster calendulaceus, also known as the flame aster, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots possess medicinal properties, with the roots being particularly valued for their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aster calendulaceus include its ability to aid in respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
